items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0-Beta-5 Available
items.message:
v3.0.0-Beta-5 is now available in pre-releases.

This update introduces a new Theme Selector, allowing you to choose between Auto, Light, and Dark modes.

The SaveManager layout has also been improved to better match the rest of the application.

You can download the latest pre-release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
